name: Browser Use · Web Navigator
description: Open a URL in a real browser and perform an arbitrary navigation task. URL + task are parameterized at trigger time. Browser-use captures screenshots and video along the way and persists them to workflow_browser_artifacts so the run page's Artifacts tab renders them.

document.name: browser-use-web-navigator
document.title: Browser Use · Web Navigator
document.summary: Parameterized browser-use session: open <url>, do <task>, report page title + final URL, capture screenshots + video.

url.title: Starting URL
url.description: The URL to open in the browser session.

task.title: Task
task.description: What the agent should do after the page loads.
task.default: Report the exact page title and final URL, plus a one-sentence description of the page content.

with.stopCondition: Stop after the final response reports the page title, final URL, and includes TASK COMPLETE.
with.prompt: ${ "Open " + .trigger.url + " in the live browser. " + .trigger.task + " When you are done, include the exact page title and final URL in your response. End your final message with TASK COMPLETE." }
